r 99

[x] md60—AD—GUR A ša₂ md60—EN-šu₂-nu A md30—TI—ER₂

[Tablet] of Anu-abu-uter, son of Anu-belšunu, descendant of Sin-leqi-unninni.

r 1010

[x] md60—DINiṭ A ša₂ mina—qi₂-bit—d60 A mE₂.⸢KUR⸣—za-kir

[Hand] of Anu-uballiṭ, son of Ina-qibit-Anu, descendant of Ekur-zakir.

r 1111

UNUGki itiGAN U₄ 4-KAM MU 1 ME 24-KAM man-ti-ʾi-i-ku-su u  ; msi-lu-ku A-šu₂ LUGAL-ME

Uruk, Kislimu, day 4, year 1 hundred 24. Antiochus and Seleucus his son, kings.

(rest of reverse blank)
